classObjective: Translate verbal sentences and real-world situations into algebraic equations and formulas.
workedExamples: 2-1, Example 1 — Write an Equation from a Verbal Sentence
2-1, Example 2 — Write an Equation from a Real-World Situation
2-1, Example 3 — Translate Sentences into Equations or Formulas
warmUp: Review variable definition and key word identification from Module 1
conceptDevelopment: Mini-lesson: variable definition, key word identification, formula recognition
guidedPractice: Teacher-led practice translating verbal sentences into algebraic equations with attention to key words
independentPractice: Practice problems translating real-world situations into algebraic equations
assessment: Exit ticket: translate 2 verbal sentences into algebraic equations
capReflection: What key words signal equality in a verbal sentence?
